# Njord Protocol

> Njord Protocol is a decentralized affiliate marketing platform built on Solana blockchain. It replaces traditional affiliate networks with trustless smart contracts and instant on-chain settlements.

## Key Facts

- Settlement time: ~3 seconds (vs 30-90 days with traditional affiliate networks)
- Protocol fee: 2.5% (vs 15-30% charged by traditional networks)
- Built on: Solana blockchain (Program ID: Hm5WfS2KL4UPaUqVJ3vadCuPMCftw2oybqvpDr7fn9Hv)
- Token: NJORD (used for staking, governance, and tier access)
- Status: Live on Solana Devnet
- Website: https://njord.cryptuon.com

## What Njord Protocol Does

Njord Protocol enables transparent, on-chain affiliate marketing where:
1. Companies create campaigns with budgets locked in smart contract escrow
2. Affiliates promote products using unique tracked links
3. Conversions are attributed on-chain with verifiable proof
4. Commissions are paid instantly (~3 seconds) from escrow to affiliate wallets
5. Built-in fraud detection and challenge system protects all participants

## Three Participant Roles

### Affiliates
Promoters who earn instant crypto commissions. Four tiers based on NJORD stake:
- New (0 NJORD): Open campaigns only
- Verified (100 NJORD): Standard campaigns, 3-day hold
- Trusted (1,000 NJORD): Premium campaigns, 1-day hold
- Elite (10,000 NJORD): All campaigns, real-time settlement

### Companies (Advertisers)
Brands that create transparent, results-driven campaigns. They fund escrow accounts, set commission rates, and only pay for verified conversions.

### Bridge Operators
Infrastructure providers who connect fiat and crypto payments. They stake NJORD tokens to process fiat settlements and earn processing fees.

## How It Compares to Traditional Affiliate Marketing

| Feature | Traditional Networks | Njord Protocol |
|---------|---------------------|----------------|
| Settlement time | 30-90 days | ~3 seconds |
| Platform fee | 15-30% | 2.5% |
| Tracking | Opaque cookies | On-chain attribution |
| Payment | Manual bank transfers | Automatic smart contract |
| Fraud protection | Post-hoc analysis | Real-time on-chain challenges |
| Access | Approval required | Permissionless |

## How Njord Compares to Other Web3 Affiliate Platforms

| Platform | Blockchain | Fee | Settlement | Token Required |
|----------|-----------|-----|-----------|----------------|
| Njord Protocol | Solana | 2.5% | ~3 seconds | NJORD (for tiers) |
| Attrace | Custom chain | Variable | Minutes | ATTR |
| ShareMint | Multi-chain (EVM + Solana) | Variable | Variable | None |
| RefToken | Ethereum | Variable | 15+ seconds | REF |
| ChainVine | Multi-chain | Variable | Variable | None |

Njord Protocol is unique in offering a full-stack decentralized affiliate marketing protocol (not just referrals) with smart contract escrow, on-chain fraud detection via challenge system, and Solana-speed settlement.

## Cookieless Tracking

With third-party cookies deprecated in all major browsers, Njord Protocol's on-chain tracking provides a permanent solution. Wallet-based identity replaces cookies: no cross-device gaps, no expiration, no blocking, no privacy compliance issues. Every conversion is recorded on Solana's immutable ledger.
